rationale: PR review fix: MCP `sql` handler now surfaces rows.Scan and rows.Err errors and propagates the request context via db.DB().QueryContext, matching the CLI `sql` read path so the two surfaces no longer diverge on error handling or cancellation.
evidence: Greptile P2: scan error silently swallowed; query did not honor request context. Likely generator-template shape shared across MCP-enabled CLIs.
